channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Phil Mickelson praises Daniel Penny for 'protecting' subway passengers from 'deranged' Jordan Neely
item.description: Phil Mickelson shared a post on X that called Daniel Penny a "hero," adding Penny was "protecting the many passengers whose lives were threatened.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No Bevo? SEC tells Texas there's no room for its 1,700-pound longhorn at title game vs. Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Southeastern Conference championship game will not feature another mascot showdown. The league said there wasn't enough space on the sideline at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta for No. 2 Texas to bring along its 1,700-pound longhorn Bevo XV. The Longhorns are facing No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Anaheim Ducks acquire Rangers captain Jacob Trouba in trade for Vaakanainen, draft pick
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — The Anaheim Ducks acquired New York Rangers captain Jacob Trouba on Friday in a trade for defenseman Urho Vaakanainen and a conditional fourth-round pick in 2025. The trade ends Trouba's five-year tenure with the Rangers, who have lost six of their last seven games.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SafeSport Center changes targeted in new bill aimed at sex abuse in sports
item.description: Four members of Congress unveiled a bipartisan bill Friday that would spark changes at the U.S. Center for SafeSport, placing a time limit on resolving cases that can sometimes take years and improving communication between the center and abuse survivors.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kylie Kelce says she sees husband Jason 'less now in retirement' than during his playing days
item.description: Jason Kelce's playing days may be over after 13 seasons, but his wife, Kylie, says the future Hall of Famer is busier now than when he played football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American ski racer Lindsey Vonn is picking up speed in her comeback bid at 40 years old
item.description: American ski racer Lindsey Vonn darted through the shadows on the speed course at Copper Mountain on a frigid morning.
item.dc:creator: Pat Graham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: College football fans puzzled over ESPN’s ‘College GameDay’ special guest picker
item.description: Fans are left confused after ESPN announced that Timothée Chalamet would be their guest picker on "College GameDay" this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hall of Famer Randy Moss is stepping away from ESPN for an extended time to deal with health issue
item.description: Hall of Fame wide receiver Randy Moss is stepping away from his ESPN analyst role for an extended time to focus on a personal health challenge, the network said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NFL legend Randy Moss stepping away from ESPN for 'extended time' due to health issues
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer Randy Moss is stepping away from ESPN's "Sunday NFL Countdown" due to health issues, ESPN said in a statement on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prep spotlight: Longtime St. Ignatius basketball coach Bob Drucker dies at 84, leaves ‘legendary’ legacy
item.description: Oakland Tech girls basketball needs better guard play. Ken Carter reflects on relationship with Samuel L. Jackson. Ygnacio Valley boys basketball on rise.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Former SaberCats star Mark Grieb finding his joy coaching Sacred Heart Prep
item.description: From San Jose to Scotland, Grieb's playing career taught him lessons that help him lead his Sacred Heart Prep team.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA returning to China after friction between league, country: report
item.description: The NBA will reportedly play preseason games in China, returning to the country for the first time in 2019 after friction between the two parties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lions clinch playoff spot with walk-off field goal in epic high-scoring affair against Packers
item.description: The Lions are back in the playoffs and have won 11 games in a row, this one being in walk-off fashion in a high-scoring affair against the Packers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Move over Magic: Nuggets star Nikola Jokic goes past Johnson on career list with 139th triple-double
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — There are moments when Nikola Jokic does things on the court that seem to defy reason — almost magical. On Thursday, he passed a player who had the same remarkable skill.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Packers head coach, Lions fan separated on field before rivalry game
item.description: Before Thursday night's NFC North clash between the Green Bay Packers and Detroit Lions, Matt LeFleur and a Detroit fan had to be separated on the field.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ashton Jeanty confirms departure from Boise State after this season
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Boise State running back and Heisman Trophy candidate Ashton Jeanty confirmed Thursday that this will be his last season at the university.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Manny Pacquiao, winner of titles in a record 8 weight classes, elected to Boxing Hall of Fame
item.description: (AP) -- Manny Pacquiao, who won titles in a record eight weight classes from flyweight to super welterweight while becoming one of boxing's biggest draws, was elected Thursday to the International Boxing Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jack Eichel says Team USA seeks to prove it has closed the gap on Canada at 4 Nations Face-Off
item.description: It didn’t take much to stir Jack Eichel’s national pride in looking ahead to representing the United States at the 4 Nations Face-Off tournament. Appearing on a Team USA Zoom call on Thursday, the Vegas Golden Knights forward jumped right in when reminded how U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pride, bragging rights and more than $115M at stake when final college playoff rankings come out
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — There's more than just school pride and bragging rights to all that bellyaching over who might be in and who might be out of college football 's first 12-team playoff.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago Blackhawks fire Luke Richardson, IceHogs' Sorensen named interim head coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Blackhawks General Manager Kyle Davidson announced Thursday the team has fired head coach Luke Richardson. Rockford IceHogs head coach Anders Sorensen has been named interim head coach and will assume duties immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Total number of Texas fans caught and punished for throwing bottles in Georgia game: Zero
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — The University of Texas investigation into the bottle-throwing incident that disrupted the Texas-Georgia game in October — and drew a harsh rebuke and fine from the Southeastern Conference — resulted in no one being caught or punished.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU inks 18 players on National Signing Day
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU football head coach Kalani Sitake announced 18 high school signees to the 2025 recruiting class on Wednesday’s first day of the December early signing period.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: A Rays move to Ybor City could still be possible
item.description: For months, the Tampa Bay Rays celebrated the signing of a deal between their group, the city of St. Petersburg, and the Pinellas County Commission.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Patterson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Dallas, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Casey DeSmith made 34 saves for the Dallas Stars, who held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Monday. It was DeSmith's first win since Oct. 24.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Matthews scores first goal since return from injury, Maple Leafs beat Blackhawks 4-1
item.description: Auston Matthews scored his first goal since returning from injury as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil season games, home opener
item.description: (KRON) – The newest Bay Area major pro sports team, the Golden State Valkyries, has announced the date of its inaugural season at the Chase Center on Monday. The inaugural game, slated for May 16 of next year, will be a California battle with the Valkyries facing the Los Angeles Sparks.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Rays' leadership, Pinellas commission at odds over new stadium
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays' future in St. Petersburg remains in doubt, as team leadership and Pinellas County commissioners are at odds over the plans for a new stadium.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz come up short against Lakers, 105-104
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anthony Davis had 33 points and 11 rebounds, LeBron James added 27 points and 14 assists, and the short-handed Los Angeles Lakers beat the Utah Jazz 105-104 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Saquon Barkley vs. Derrick Henry was never supposed to be a head-to-head matchup. “It ain't basketball. It ain't like I go out there and tackle Derrick Henry,” Barkley said. “To be honest, I don't know if I really want to tackle Derrick Henry.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5
